privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to create a Flask application from scratch. The expected project directory is '/home/ga/PycharmProjects/hello_flask'. Within this directory, the agent must create 'app.py' (the main application file), 'test_app.py' (the pytest test file), and 'requirements.txt' (containing the Flask dependency). All these paths and filenames are confirmed by the evaluation scripts.
